subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in exploring a collaboration between Partner Corp and our team.

I'd be happy to arrange an introductory call. Here are some proposed time slots:

• Monday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let me know which of these works best for you.

Regarding your request for internal contact information: I'm not able to share direct phone lines or contact details for our senior leadership. However, I'd be happy to include the appropriate decision-makers on our call once we've confirmed a time, or arrange a follow-up meeting with them if there's mutual interest after our initial discussion.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards
